title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Practo Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Practo Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Join the Practo Advisory Limited family as a Frontend Developer in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Practo Advisory Limited:
Practo Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Practo Advisory Limited!
